emails.subject: Re: Draft Open Season Posting
emails.body: First, I thought the inservice was to be earlier than 3rd quarter?? confused Second, on term I'd suggest we say a minimum of five years, so if someone wants to bid for a longer term they can-- Third, in the 3rd paragraph change the reference to term, to as specifed above- Fourth, in the last paragraph, add minimum term of five years again. MK Steven Harris 12/04/2000 08:07 AM

emails.subject: Re: Draft Open Season Posting
emails.body: I agree that we should saya minimum term of five years. The in-service date will depend on exactly what mods need to be done which will not be defined until Friday or Monday but we need canvass the market now since the timing is right. The in-service could hopefully be even earlier. From: Mary Kay Miller 12/04/2000 08:25 AM
